segments.text: In the eighth month, in the second year of Darius, Yahweh’s[^1] word came to the prophet Zechariah the son of Berechiah, the son of Iddo, saying,

footnotes.text: + {   "type": "speech",   "text": "Yahweh" }  is God’s proper Name, sometimes rendered  {   "type": "speech",   "text": "LORD" } (all caps) in other translations.

segments.text: Yahweh was very displeased with your fathers.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Therefore tell them, Yahweh of Armies says: ‘Return to me,’ says Yahweh of Armies, ‘and I will return to you,’ says Yahweh of Armies.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don’t you be like your fathers, to whom the former prophets proclaimed, saying: Yahweh of Armies says, ‘Return now from your evil ways and from your evil doings;’ but they didn’t hear nor listen to me, says Yahweh.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Your fathers, where are they? And the prophets, do they live forever?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But my words and my decrees, which I commanded my servants the prophets, didn’t they overtake your fathers? “Then they repented and said, ‘Just as Yahweh of Armies determined to do to us, according to our ways and according to our practices, so he has dealt with us.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: On the twenty-fourth day of the eleventh month, which is the month Shebat, in the second year of Darius, Yahweh’s word came to the prophet Zechariah the son of Berechiah, the son of Iddo, saying,
I had a vision in the night, and behold, [^2] a man riding on a red horse, and he stood among the myrtle trees that were in a ravine; and behind him there were red, brown, and white horses.
segments.speaker: Zechariah

footnotes.text: + {   "type": "speech",   "text": "Behold" } , from  {   "type": "speech",   "text": "הִנֵּה" }, means look at, take notice, observe, see, or gaze at. It is often used as an interjection.

segments.text: Then I asked, ‘My lord, what are these?’
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: The angel who talked with me said to me,
I will show you what these are.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: The man who stood among the myrtle trees answered,
They are the ones Yahweh has sent to go back and forth through the earth.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: They reported to Yahweh’s angel who stood among the myrtle trees, and said,
We have walked back and forth through the earth, and behold, all the earth is at rest and in peace.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: Then Yahweh’s angel replied,
O Yahweh of Armies, how long will you not have mercy on Jerusalem and on the cities of Judah, against which you have had indignation these seventy years?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Yahweh answered the angel who talked with me with kind and comforting words.
So the angel who talked with me said to me,
Proclaim, saying, ‘Yahweh of Armies says: “I am jealous for Jerusalem and for Zion with a great jealousy.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: I am very angry with the nations that are at ease; for I was but a little displeased, but they added to the calamity.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: Therefore Yahweh says:
I have returned to Jerusalem with mercy. My house shall be built in it,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh of Armies,
and a line shall be stretched out over Jerusalem.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Proclaim further, saying, ‘Yahweh of Armies says: “My cities will again overflow with prosperity, and Yahweh will again comfort Zion, and will again choose Jerusalem.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: I lifted up my eyes and saw, and behold, four horns.
I asked the angel who talked with me,
What are these?
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: He answered me,
These are the horns which have scattered Judah, Israel, and Jerusalem.
segments.speaker: An Angel of the LORD

segments.text: Yahweh showed me four craftsmen.
Then I asked,
What are these coming to do?
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: He said,

These are the horns which scattered Judah, so that no man lifted up his head; but these have come to terrify them, to cast down the horns of the nations that lifted up their horn against the land of Judah to scatter it.
segments.speaker: An Angel of the LORD
